action_set_definitions.name: get_report_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the core information for a specific expense report from the pending list.

report_id.description: The unique identifier of the expense report (e.g., 'EXP-4402').

action_set_definitions.name: get_receipt_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves detailed receipt data and metadata for a specific report to identify participants, region, and third-party entities.

report_id.description: The unique identifier of the expense report.

action_set_definitions.name: get_regulatory_status
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the anti-bribery and corruption (ABC) status of a third-party entity or individual recipient.

entity_name.description: The name of the organization or individual to check.

action_set_definitions.name: get_audit_policy
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the spending limits and compliance rules based on region, expense category, and the regulatory status of the recipient.

region.description: The geographic region associated with the expense.

action_set_definitions.name: get_cumulative_benefit_history
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates the total value of benefits provided to a specific individual recipient during the current fiscal year.

recipient_name.description: The name of the individual recipient.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_audit_decision
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the expense report status with a final disposition and logs the reasoning in the audit log.

report_id.description: The unique identifier of the report.

reasoning.description: Detailed explanation of the decision based on policy checks.

state_description.pending_reports: A list of expense report objects currently awaiting audit, including ID, employee, total amount, and category.
state_description.receipt_vault: A mapping of report IDs to lists of receipt data/metadata for verification.
state_description.audit_policy: The set of rules defining spending limits and required documentation per category.
state_description.audit_log: An internal record of all actions taken and their outcomes for consistency tracking.
state_description.system_status: The current operational mode of the auditing environment (e.g., 'active', 'session_closed').

attendees: Zhang Wei (Chief Procurement Officer, Z-Tech Solutions)
